description: As a shopper I cannot apply invalid discounts.

comments.author: pm.jane
comments.body: Clarification on AC-3: discount stacking is OUT OF SCOPE for this story — reject a second discount with 409, ticket PROJ-310 will handle stacking.

comments.author: dev.omar
comments.body: Watch the rounding edge case: pct 33 on a 100 total must give 67, not 66.99 — totals are integers.
